title: State of Rajasthan v. Verma - wrongful Dismissal Reinstated
description: Successfully contested the termination of a senior government officer. The High Court ordered complete reinstatement with retrospective seniority rights and full back-wages.

title: Secured Anticipatory Bail in Dowry Harassment Allegation (Section 498-A)
description: Successfully argued for anticipatory bail before the High Court for the husband's immediate family members, demonstrating a lack of specific allegations in the complaint.

title: Retrospective Promotion & Pensionary Benefits Decreed - CAT Jodhpur
description: Obtained a favorable judgment in the Central Administrative Tribunal directing department heads to grant retrospective promotion and release delayed pension amounts with interest.

title: Commercial FIR Quashed under Section 482 CrPC
description: The High Court accepted our petition and quashed criminal proceedings in a commercial matter, establishing that the dispute was of a civil contractual nature rather than criminal.

title: Specific Performance Decreed in Property Partition Suit
description: Secured a civil court decree for specific performance of property partition, directing the partition and handover of the rightful share of ancestral land to the client.

title: Financial Dispute Recovery - Section 138 NI Act Conviction Upheld
description: Represented the complainant in a cheque dishonour case. The appellate court upheld the conviction and ordered the drawer to pay twice the cheque value as compensation.

title: Child Custody Secured for Aggrieved Mother
description: Successfully represented a mother in child custody proceedings, proving that the child's developmental interests were best served under the mother's guardianship.

title: Magistrate Protection Order under Domestic Violence Act
description: Obtained protection and residential maintenance orders for the client, securing her right to remain in the shared marital household without disturbance.

title: Arbitration Award Confirmed in Partnership Accounting Dispute
description: Successfully defended a partnership firm in court, securing the execution and enforcement of a favorable arbitration award for contract recovery.

title: District Consumer Commission Order - Real Estate Refund
description: Secured an order from the Consumer Forum directing a developer to refund the full booking amount with interest and compensation due to a long delay in delivering possession.

title: Suspension of Sentence Allowed in Criminal Appeal
description: Obtained suspension of sentence and bail for the appellant in Jodhpur Sessions Court during the pendency of the appeal against conviction.

title: Hindu Marriage Act - Restitution of Conjugal Rights Allowed
description: Represented the petitioner in a petition under Section 9 of the Hindu Marriage Act. The court decreed in favor of conjugal restitution.
